global.description: The ad features a clean layout with a focus on a new product collection and a promotional sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a new collection at an attractive price.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A simple logo with the text 'ZenDrop' in a clean, modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching letters, located at the top right.

elements.label: New collection announcement
elements.description: A large, bold text stating 'New collection drop' in a prominent position at the bottom, conveying excitement.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: The price '€19.9' is displayed in a large, bold font, emphasizing affordability and value.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Learn more' in a contrasting color, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, indicating user-generated content, located at the top.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, minimalist with soft colors, new collection drop, SALE badge
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top left, the SALE badge at the top right, the main text at the bottom center, and the CTA button below the main text.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: ZenDrop, SALE, UGC, New collection drop, €19.9, Learn more
